issues: Form inputs, while functional, lack distinct hover/focus states to match the site's polish.
The 'SCROLL' indicator at the top feels generic and could be more stylized.
Lack of visible hover/focus states for interactive elements (buttons, links, form fields) in the static image.
The 'SCROLL' indicator feels generic and slightly out of place.
The wavy graphic in the 'About This Page' section doesn't fully align with the overall aesthetic.
strengths: Polished dark mode aesthetic with a well-chosen and consistently applied accent color.
Excellent use of typography and a consistent, game-appropriate color system.
Immersive full-bleed hero section and well-presented character-focused content.
Strong thematic consistency and immersive visual style, fitting the game archetype.
Strong thematic visual design with effective use of custom typography and a consistent color palette.
specific_improvements: Enhance form input fields with subtle hover/focus states (e.g., a slight border glow or background change) to improve interactivity cues.
Consolidate and clarify navigation categories for better user experience and consistency.
Replace the wavy graphic in the 'About' section with a more fitting visual element or remove it for a cleaner look.
Remove or redesign the 'SCROLL' indicator to be more integrated or subtle.
Redesign the 'SCROLL' indicator to be more visually engaging and thematic, perhaps with a unique icon or subtle animation.
